editusergroup: Hùn adà ogbẹ zinzantọ lẹ tọn
viewinguserrights: A to pinpọn ogbẹ zinzantọ lẹ tọn {{GENDER:$1|zinzantọ}} tọn [[User:$1|$1]] $2
userrights-groups-help:
A sọgan diọ nulẹ to pipli lọ lẹ {{GENDER:$1|zinzántọ ehe}} tin to:
* Apotin he ko yin hiadogona de zẹemẹdo dọ zinzántọ de tin to pipli enẹ mẹ.
* Apotin he ma yin hiadogona de zẹemẹdo dọ zinzántọ de ma tin to pipli enẹ mẹ.
* A * nọ dlẹnalọdo dọ à ma sọgan de pipli de sẹ ba eyin a yí í dogọ godo, podọ to alọ awetọ lọsu mẹ.
* A # nọ dlẹnalọdo dọ godo janwẹ a gán gọ̀ ojlẹ he mẹde na yin apadewhé pipli de tọn do; a ma gán ṣẹ ẹ do nukọ̀n.
userrights-no-interwiki: Yè ma nagbè we nado basi vọjlado jlọjẹ zinzántọ tọn lẹ to wiki devo lẹ ji.
userrights-nodatabase: Database $1 does not exist or is not local.
userrights-changeable-col: Ogbẹ́ he a sọgan diọ lẹ
userrights-unchangeable-col: Ogbẹ́ he a ma sọgan diọ lẹ
userrights-expiry-options: Azan 1:1 day,osẹ̀ 1:1 week, osùn 1:1 month, osùn 3:3 months,osùn 6:6 months, owhè 1:1 year
userrights-invalid-expiry: Whenu he yin nina bọ ogbẹ́ "$1" tọn nido dohó ma yin alọkẹyi
userrights-expiry-in-past: Whenu he yin nina bọ ogbẹ́ "$1" tọn nido dohó lọ ko wayi.
userrights-conflict: Diọdo jlọjẹ zinzántọ tọn lẹ tọn sọta yede! Jaale vọ́ gbadopọnna diọdo lọ lẹ bosọ hẹn ye diun.
grouppage-interface-admin: {{ns:project}}:Anadenanutọ adà hodidọ dopọ po ọdinatẹ po tọn tọn lẹ
right-createpage: Dá weda lẹ (ehe ma yin weda hodọdopọ tọn lẹ)
right-autocreateaccount: Hùn adà towe tlọlọ po adà zinzántọ tọn gbonu tọn de po
right-minoredit: Do diọdo lẹ hia taidi pẹvi
right-move-subpages: Sẹtẹn na weda lẹ po weda he to odò na ye lẹ po
right-move-rootuserpages: Sẹtẹ̀nna adọ̀ weda zinzántọ lẹ tọn
right-reupload: Diọtẹnna wepo he tin to aimẹ lẹ
right-reupload-own: Yí nudọnamẹ dogọ wepo de he mẹlọ lọsu na ede sẹ̀ do.
right-upload_by_url: Má wepo sọn URL de mẹ
right-autoconfirmed: Ni ma yin nuyiwadeji gbọn dogbó he sinai do sọha IP tọn ji blo
right-bot: Ni yin hinhẹn taidi nuwiwa zomọ̀ dé tọn
right-nominornewtalk: Na vọjlado pẹvide do weda hodọdopọ tọn ni nọ dọn wekànhlanmẹ yọyọ lẹ
right-bigdelete: Súnsún weda hé dó kandai he gblo lẹ
right-deletelogentry: súnsún todohukanji kandai tangan lẹ tọn sẹ kavi gọ̀ yé do tẹnmẹ
right-deleterevision: Súnsún bosọ gọ̀ vọzepọn tangan weda lẹ tọn do otẹ̀n yetọn mẹ
right-deletedhistory: Pọ́n kandai onú he ko yin súnsúnsún lẹ tọn, matin nukinkan he gando yé go lẹ
right-deletedtext: Pọ́n nukinkan he ko yin súnsúnsún sẹ̀ lẹ po diọdo he tin to vọzepọn he yin súnsúnsún sẹ̀ lẹ po ṣẹnṣẹn.
right-undelete: Gọ̀ weda he yin sunsunsẹ de do otẹn etọn mẹ.
right-suppressrevision: Pọ́n, whlá bosọ de vọzepọn tangan weda lẹ tọn jẹ gbonu na zinzántọ depope
right-viewsuppressed: Pọn vọzepọn he yin whiwhlá do zinzantọ depope lẹ
right-block: Glọnnalina bosọ na dotẹnmẹ zinzántọ devo lẹ nado bayi vọjlado
right-blockemail: Glọnnalina bosọ na dotẹnmẹ zinzantọ de ma nado sẹ́ email do
right-hideuser: Sú kavi hùn tẹnmẹyinkọ de, nado glọnnalina ẹn ma nado sọawuhia to gbangba kavi nado dike ni wamọ
right-ipblock-exempt: Dasá aliglọnnamẹ IP tọn lẹ, aliglọnnamẹ he ọdinatẹ wleawuna lẹ po aliglọnnamẹ lẹdo mẹ tọn lẹ
right-editprotected: Basi vọjlado weda he ko yin hihọ́basina taidi "{{int:restriction-level-sysop}}" lẹ tọn
